description_long: This helmet features a sleek, angular design with a predominantly dark red and black color scheme, reminiscent of advanced, high-tech protective gear. The front faceplate is sharply contoured, with narrow, horizontal eye slits and a central, slightly raised forehead section that appears metallic and reflective. The sides of the helmet display circular, mechanical-like details, possibly for audio or ventilation, and the surface shows subtle wear and scuff marks, suggesting use or exposure to urban environments. The rear of the helmet is smooth and rounded, with no visible openings or attachments, maintaining a streamlined silhouette. The overall construction appears to be a hard, glossy composite material, likely reinforced plastic or metal, designed for both protection and style. The interior is not visible, but it is likely padded for comfort and fit.
description: A sleek, dark red and black helmet with a contoured faceplate, narrow eye slits, and circular side details, finished in a glossy, high-tech style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply contoured faceplate, narrow eye slits, and a prominent central forehead section.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the circular mechanical detail near the ear area and the smooth, rounded back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the helmet's smooth, uninterrupted black surface with no visible openings or attachments.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with the same circular detail and contoured red and black color separation.
attribute_graphic_design: Solid dark red and black color blocks with metallic accents; no additional graphics or motifs.
